title: Benchmark scenarios and visualization
description: Given generated fixture data, when I run benchmarks (load-time, query-time, cache, concurrency, memory), each scenario should produce valid timing output. Visualization generates SVG charts and a markdown report. Spec: features/benchmarks/benchmark_scenarios.feature

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Starting benchmark scenarios + visualization outputs. Next: implement benchmark runner + SVG/report generation. Blockers: none.
